zh.lifeSummary: 當Idonea de Graham於1237年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯時，她的父親Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith31歲，母親Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith27歲。她於1265年與Adam de Swynburne在英國諾圖波藍德勒頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1326年之前在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Idonea de Graham于1237年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯时，她的父亲Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith31岁，母亲Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith27岁。她于1265年与Adam de Swynburne在英国諾圖波藍德勒頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1326年之前在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Idonea
meanings: An old baptismal name derived from Latin idoneus, fit, meet, proper.

en.lifeSummary: When Idonea de Graham was born in 1237, in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith, was 31 and her mother, Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith, was 27. She married Adam de Swynburne in 1265, in Chollerton, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died before 1326, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Idonea de Graham est née en 1237, à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Adam de Swynburne en 1265, à Chollerton, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1326, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Idonea de Graham 1237 in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith 31 und ihre Mutter Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith 27. Sie hat 1265 in Chollerton, Northumberland, England Adam de Swynburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1326 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Idonea de Graham è nata il nel 1237 nel Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Adam de Swynburne nel 1265, nel Chollerton, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1326, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Idonea de Grahamが1237年にスコットランドミドロスアンダルケイスで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeithは31歳，母Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeithは27歳であった。1265年にイギリスノースウンバーランドチオラートンでAdam de Swynburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1326年以前にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Idonea de Graham(이)가 1237년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1265년 영국 노르스벌랜드 컬레르턴에서 Adam de Swynburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Idonea de Graham nasceu em 1237, em Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam de Swynburne em 1265, em Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1326, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Idonea de Graham родилась в 1237 г. в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam de Swynburne в 1265 г. в местности чоллиртон, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 1326 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Idonea de Graham nació en 1237, en Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Sir Henry de Graham of Abercon - Baron of Dalkeith, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Countess Idonea de Avenel of Dalkeith, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Adam de Swynburne en 1265, en Chollerton, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1326, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
